description: CDP monitoring dashboard for trade-exports-packinglistparser service

targets.query: container_name:"trade-exports-packinglistparser" AND message:"completed successfully" AND NOT message:NOMATCH
container_name:"trade-exports-packinglistparser" AND log.level:"error" AND message:"Failed to send message to Service Bus"
container_name:"trade-exports-packinglistparser" AND log.level:"error" AND (message:"bearerTokenRequest() failed" OR message:"getDispatchLocation()")
container_name:"trade-exports-packinglistparser" AND log.level:"error" AND message:"Failed to create blob service client"
container_name:"trade-exports-packinglistparser" AND log.level:"error" AND message:"Failed to call Azure API"
container_name:"trade-exports-packinglistparser" AND log.level:"error" AND message:"Failed to send message to Service Bus"
container_name:"trade-exports-packinglistparser" AND log.level:"error" AND (message:"bearerTokenRequest() failed" OR message:"getDispatchLocation()")
container_name:"trade-exports-packinglistparser" AND log.level:"error" AND message:"Failed to create blob service client"
container_name:"trade-exports-packinglistparser" AND log.level:"error" AND message:"Failed to call Azure API"
container_name:"trade-exports-packinglistparser" AND message:connectivity AND message:check AND message:200
container_name:"trade-exports-packinglistparser" AND message:connectivity AND message:check AND message:503
container_name:"trade-exports-packinglistparser" AND log.level:"error" AND message:"Failed to initialize"

title: trade-exports-packinglistparser (custom)
